summary: All 13 checkable assertions verified against ground truth. Every code_ref (websocket_service.py lines 31, 166, 179, and inline 35/36/158-189/225-241) matches the actual Pipecat source exactly, including the 5.0s threshold and 3-quick-failure counter, the counter-reset-on-stable behavior, the clean-close vs abrupt-close split, and _disconnecting suppression. Both Deepgram ebook citations (line 592 backoff; 2074-2080 auth/connection failure mode) are confirmed in the raw parsed PDF. LiveKit max_retry=16 on the worker WS confirmed in worker.py:223. No WRONG or MISCITED claims.
